ground_truth.title: Pricing & Memberships
ground_truth.main_content:
Pricing & Memberships
New Membership offers
If you have questions about our membership options, please contact our staff by email or phone.

Booking uses a credit. The recording sent to you is available for 48 hours.

with: If you have questions about our membership options, please contact our staff by email or phone.

Monthly: $180 / mo - Practicing 2x/week or more - Member Benefits: 3 month commitment, Unlimited access to 75+ weekly classes, Retail Discounts, 14 yearly guest passes, Referral Discounts, Workshop Discounts, Optional Mat & Towel Add Ons

Annual Membership: $2,040 / yr - Commit to your practice for 1 year - Member Benefits: Unlimited access to 75+ weekly classes, Retail Discounts, 14 yearly guest passes, Referral Discounts, Optional Mat & Towel Add Ons

Livestream Pricing: Monthly $108 / mo - CFYLA Livestream Membership - Member Benefits: Free access to over 100 Interactive classes a month via Zoom, Cancel any time after the initial three-month commitment, Easily Manage Your Booking Online or Over the Phone
